pi_items.source: Confirmed from task instructions and Oracle Analytics Desktop default behavior.
Confirmed from task instructions requiring this exact title.
Confirmed from task instructions and the 'Sample Order Lines' (Superstore) dataset columns. 'Quantity' correctly matches the 'Quantity Ordered' column in the dataset.
Confirmed from the task instruction to create a 'Parallel Coordinates' visualization.
Confirmed from the environment's 'Docker' user profile, which evaluates the Documents folder to this exact Windows path.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates an Oracle Analytics Desktop (.dva) workbook named 'Shipping_Profile_Analysis.dva' stored in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\. The visualization must be a Parallel Coordinates chart, titled 'Shipping Mode Profile Analysis'. It references the 'Ship Mode', 'Sales', 'Quantity' (which maps to 'Quantity Ordered'), 'Discount', and 'Profit' columns from the synthetic Sample Order Lines dataset.
